debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝¹¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹⁰ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝⁹ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E
H : Type u_2
inst✝⁸ : TopologicalSpace H
I : ModelWithCorners ℝ E H
M : Type u_3
inst✝⁷ : TopologicalSpace M
inst✝⁶ : ChartedSpace H M
m : IsManifold I (↑⊤) M
hI : I.Boundaryless
E' : Type u_4
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E'
inst✝⁴ : NormedSpace ℝ E'
inst✝³ : FiniteDimensional ℝ E'
H' : Type u_5
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace H'
I' : ModelWithCorners ℝ E' H'
N : Type u_6
inst✝¹ : TopologicalSpace N
inst✝ : ChartedSpace H' N
m' : IsManifold I' (↑⊤) N
f : M → N
s : Set M
hs : IsOpen s
x✝¹ : DiffeologicalSpace M := @IsManifold.toDiffeology E inst✝¹¹ inst✝¹⁰ H inst✝⁸ I M inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ m
x✝ : DiffeologicalSpace N := @IsManifold.toDiffeology E' inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴ H' inst✝² I' N inst✝¹ inst✝ m'
hf : DSmooth (s.restrict f)
x : M
hxs : x ∈ s
⊢ ContMDiffWithinAt I I' (↑⊤) f s x

failed_attempts: simpa using (contMDiffWithinAt_univ : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' (∞ : WithTop ℕ) f s x)

have hfrestrict : ContMDiffOn I I' ∞ (s.restrict f) (s : Set (↥s)) := by
    classical
    have := (IsOpen.dsmooth_iff_smoothOn (I := I) (M := ↥s) (I' := I') (N := N) hs').1 hf
    simpa using this
  have hx : (⟨x, hxs⟩ : ↥s) ∈ (s : Set (↥s)) := by simp
  have := hfrestrict (⟨x, hxs⟩ : ↥s) hx
  simpa [ContMDiffOn, ContMDiffWithinAt, restrict_eq] using this
simpa [ContMDiffWithinAt, hs.mem_nhds hxs] using (contMDiffWithinAt_univ : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f (univ : Set M) x)
(contMDiffWithinAt_univ : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f s x)

have hfx : ContMDiffAt I I' ∞ f x := by
    have := hf 0 (fun _ : Eucl 0 => x) (by simpa using contMDiff_const)
    simpa using this
  exact hfx.contMDiffWithinAt

exact hf.dsmoothAt hxnhds
  have hcm : ContMDiffAt (𝓡 (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E)) I ∞ (chartAt H x) x :=
    contMDiffAt_chartAt (I := I) (x := x)
  have hcm' : ContMDiffAt I (𝓡 (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E)) ∞ (chartAt H x).symm
      ((chartAt H x) x) :=
    contMDiffAt_chartAt_symm (I := I) (x := x)
  have hloc : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f (s ∩ (chartAt H x).source) x := by
    have : ContMDiffWithinAt (𝓡 (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E)) I' ∞
        (f ∘ (chartAt H x).symm) ((chartAt H x) '' (s ∩ (chartAt H x).source)) ((chartAt H x) x) := by
      sorry
    exact (this.comp x (hcm'.contMDiffWithinAt)).congr_of_eq (by simp) (by simp)
  exact hloc.mono (inter_subset_left)

intro n p hp
    simpa [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] using (hf n p (by simpa [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] using hp))
  have hx : x ∈ s := hxs
  have hs' : s ∈ 𝓝 x := hs.mem_nhds hx
  simpa [restrict_eq] using (hf'.contMDiffAt hs').contMDiffWithinAt

have hs' : s ∈ 𝓝 x := hs.mem_nhds hxs
  refine (contMDiffWithinAt_iff_eventuallyEq_of_mem ?_ hs').2 ?_
  · exact fun y hy ↦ hs.mem_nhds hy
  · refine (hf _ (fun y ↦ (chartAt H x) y)).contMDiffWithinAt
      (I := I) (I' := I') (s := s) ?_
    exact (contMDiff_chartAt (I := I) x).contMDiffWithinAt

have hxsrc : x ∈ (chartAt H x).source := mem_chart_source H x
  have hchart_open : IsOpen ((chartAt H x).source ∩ s) :=
    (isOpen_chart_source (H := H) (x := x)).inter hs
  have hx_mem : x ∈ (chartAt H x).source ∩ s := ⟨hxsrc, hxs⟩
  have hds : DSmooth ((chartAt H x).source ∩ s).restrict f := by
    have : DSmooth (s.restrict f) := hf
    exact this.dsmooth_restrict (by
      intro y hy
      exact ⟨hy.2⟩)
  have hcont_on :
      ContMDiffOn I I' ∞ f ((chartAt H x).source ∩ s) := by
    intro y hy
    -- reduce to smoothness of `f ∘ (chartAt H x).symm` in coordinates
    -- by `DSmooth` assumption on the restriction to the chart domain
    have : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f ((chartAt H x).source ∩ s) y := by
      -- DSmooth implies smoothness in charts since this diffeology is defined by `ContMDiff`
      -- unfold the definitions and use `hds` on the plot `(chartAt H x).symm`
      have hplot :
          IsPlot ((chartAt H x).target.restrict (chartAt H x).symm) := by
        simpa [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] using
          (contMDiff_chart_symm (x := x) : ContMDiff I (𝓡 (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E)) ∞
            (chartAt H x).symm)
      -- apply dsmoothness to this plot
      have := hds _ _ (by
        -- the induced plot into the restricted set
        simpa [DiffeologicalSpace.isPlot_iff] )
      -- from `ContMDiff` of the coordinate expression, deduce smoothness at `y`
      -- using the standard characterization via charts
      simpa using
        (m.contMDiffWithinAt_iff (I := I) (I' := I') (f := f) (s := (chartAt H x).source ∩ s)
          (x := y)).2 (by
            simpa using this)
    exact this
  -- now restrict back to `s` using locality on the open neighborhood `chartAt.source ∩ s`
  have hle : (chartAt H x).source ∩ s ⊆ s := inter_subset_right
  exact (hcont_on x hx_mem).mono hle

simpa [ContMDiffWithinAt] using (m.contMDiffWithinAt_of_dsmoothOn_restrict (m' := m') (f := f)
    (s := s) hs hf x hxs)
simpa using (contMDiff_const : ContMDiff (𝓡 0) I ∞ (fun _ : Eucl 0 ↦ x)))).contMDiffWithinAt

simpa [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] using hf _ _ (isPlot_const (x := x))
  exact this

let g : Eucl (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E) → M := fun y =>
    (chartAt H x).symm y
  have hg : ContMDiff (𝓡 (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E)) I ∞ g := by
    simpa [g] using contMDiff_chart_symm (x := x)
  have hg' :
      DSmooth (fun y : Eucl (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E) ↦
        (⟨g y, by
          have : g y ∈ (chartAt H x).source := by
            simpa [g] using (chartAt H x).map_target (by trivial : y ∈ (chartAt H x).target)
          have hx : (chartAt H x).source ⊆ s := by
            have : (chartAt H x).source ⊆ s := by
              have : (chartAt H x).source ⊆ s := by
                intro z hz
                have : z ∈ s := by
                  have : z ∈ (chartAt H x).source := hz
                  have : z ∈ s := by
                    have hxmem : x ∈ s := hxs
                    have hnhds : s ∈ 𝓝 x := hs.mem_nhds hxmem
                    have : (chartAt H x).source ∈ 𝓝 x := (mem_chart_source H x)
                    have : (chartAt H x).source ⊆ s := by
                      exact (mem_nhds_iff.1 (inter_mem (mem_chart_source H x) hnhds)).1
                    exact this _ hz
                  exact this
                exact this
              exact this
            exact this
          exact hx _ this⟩ : s) := by
    rw [isPlot_iff_contMDiff] at hg
    exact ContMDiffOn.dsmooth_restrict (m := m) (m' := m) (I := I) (I' := I)
      (f := fun y => (chartAt H x).symm y) (s := (Set.univ : Set _)) (by
        simpa [ContMDiffOn, hg] )
  have hcomp :
      DSmooth (fun y : Eucl (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E) ↦
        s.restrict f ⟨g y, by
          have : g y ∈ (chartAt H x).source := by
            simpa [g] using (chartAt H x).map_target (by trivial : y ∈ (chartAt H x).target)
          have : g y ∈ s := by
            have hxmem : x ∈ s := hxs
            have hnhds : s ∈ 𝓝 x := hs.mem_nhds hxmem
            have : (chartAt H x).source ∈ 𝓝 x := (mem_chart_source H x)
            have : (chartAt H x).source ⊆ s := by
              exact (mem_nhds_iff.1 (inter_mem (mem_chart_source H x) hnhds)).1
            exact this _ this⟩) := hf _ _ hg'
  have : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f s x := by
    simpa using (m.contMDiffWithinAt_iff_dsmoothWithinAt (m' := m') (I := I) (I' := I')
      (f := f) (s := s) (x := x)).2 (by
        simpa [DSmoothWithinAt, Function.comp] using hcomp.dsmoothWithinAt)
  exact this

let e := chartAt H x
  have hxmem : x ∈ e.source := mem_chart_source H x
  have hse : IsOpen (s ∩ e.source) := hs.inter e.open_source
  have hxse : x ∈ s ∩ e.source := ⟨hxs, hxmem⟩
  have hmem : s ∩ e.source ∈ 𝓝 x := hse.mem_nhds hxse
  have hds : DSmoothAt (fun y : s => f y.1) ⟨x, hxs⟩ := by
    have : DSmooth (s.restrict f) := hf
    exact this.dsmoothAt
  have hcont : ContinuousAt f x := by
    have : ContinuousAt (fun y : s => f y.1) ⟨x, hxs⟩ := hds.continuousAt
    simpa [ContinuousAt, restrict_eq, Function.comp] using this
  have hloc : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f (s ∩ e.source) x := by
    simpa [IsManifold.toDiffeology, isPlot_iff_contMDiff] using
      (m.contMDiffWithinAt_iff.2
        ⟨e, hxmem, by simpa using hcont, by
          have : DSmoothWithinAt (s.restrict f) (s ∩ e.source) x := by
            refine (hf.dsmoothAt).dsmoothWithinAt
          simpa [restrict_eq, Function.comp_assoc] using this⟩)
  exact hloc.mono (by intro y hy; exact hy.1)

have hf' : DSmoothAt (s.restrict f) x := by
    have : DSmoothOn (s.restrict f) s := fun y hy ↦ (hf (x := y) (hxy := hy)).dsmoothAt
    exact this.dsmoothAt hx
  have hcont : ContinuousAt f x := by
    have hcont' : ContinuousAt (s.restrict f) x := hf'.continuousAt
    simpa [restrict_eq] using hcont'.comp continuousAt_subtype_val
  have hx' : x ∈ (chartAt H x).source := mem_chart_source H x
  have hs' : s ∈ 𝓝[ s ] x := mem_nhdsWithin_of_mem_nhds hx
  have hsx : s ∩ (chartAt H x).source ∈ 𝓝[ s ] x := inter_mem hs' ((chartAt H x).open_source.mem_nhds hx')
  have hsx' : s ∩ (chartAt H x).source ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    exact (IsOpen.mem_nhds_iff.1 (hs.inter (chartAt H x).open_source)) ⟨hxs, hx'⟩
  have hmf : ContMDiffWithinAt (𝓡 (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E)) I ∞ (chartAt H x) s x :=
    (contMDiffWithinAt_chartAt (I := I) (x := x) (s := s))
  have hms : ContMDiffWithinAt I (𝓡 (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E)) ∞ (chartAt H x).symm
      ((chartAt H x).target) ((chartAt H x) x) :=
    (contMDiffWithinAt_chartAt_symm (I := I) (x := x))
  have hfs : DSmoothAt (s.restrict f) x := hf'.dsmoothAt
  have hloc : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f (s ∩ (chartAt H x).source) x := by
    have : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f s x := by
      simpa using (contMDiffWithinAt_iff_of_mem_source (I := I) (I' := I') (n := ∞) (f := f)
        (s := s) (x := x) hx' hcont).2
        (by
          have hplot : IsPlot ((chartAt H x).target.restrict ((chartAt H x) ∘ (fun y : Eucl (FiniteDimensional.finrank ℝ E) => y)))
              := by
            simp
          exact (isPlot_iff_contMDiff I M).1 (by simpa using hplot))
    exact this.mono (by intro y hy; exact hy.1)
  have : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' ∞ f s x := by
    exact hloc.congr_of_eventuallyEq_of_mem (by
      refine (hsx'.eventuallyEq_of_mem ?_ ?_) <;> simp) (by simpa using hsx') 
  exact this
